skills.name: cq
skills.description: Claudekiq workflow engine — start, resume, monitor workflows, setup projects. Use /cq to list and run workflows, /cq <workflow> to start one, /cq status for dashboard, /cq init or /cq setup to initialize.

commands.name: cq-approve
commands.description: Handle workflow approval gates — presents human gates and review escalations to the user for approval. Called by /cq-runner.

commands.name: cq-runner
commands.description: Execute workflow steps in a loop — dispatches bash, agent, skill, batch, and sub-workflow steps. Called by /cq with a run_id.

commands.name: cq-setup
commands.description: Smart project setup — discovers agents, skills, stacks, and commands. Helps define workflows. Called internally by /cq setup.

commands.name: cq-worker
commands.description: Execute a single agent step in a cq workflow. Handles prompt assembly, model selection, agent spawning, heartbeat, resume, and result extraction.

commands.name: cq
commands.description: Claudekiq workflow engine — start, resume, monitor workflows, setup projects. Use /cq to list and run workflows, /cq <workflow> to start one, /cq status for dashboard, /cq init or /cq setup to initialize.
